entities.girl: an older girl with crossed arms

scenes.title: The Living Room
scenes.background_prompt: A cozy living room with a large beige couch, a wooden side table, a windowsill with a cushion, a patterned rug on the floor, and scattered flower petals. No people, no animals.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A cozy living room. An older girl of about ten with long dark hair, wearing a red t-shirt and jeans, stands in the center of the room with her arms tightly crossed over her chest and her brows furrowed in a stern expression. She stares down at the floor where a broken white ceramic vase lies in several pieces on a patterned rug, with water pooled around it and pink and yellow flowers scattered among the shards. To the left, a younger boy of about six with curly blond hair peeks out nervously from behind a large beige couch, only his wide eyes and the top of his head visible above the armrest. An orange tabby cat sits calmly on the windowsill to the right, its tail curled around its paws, watching the scene with half-closed eyes. A wooden side table stands where the vase presumably fell from, now empty.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place girl in the center of the room, standing with arms tightly crossed, brows furrowed, staring down at the broken vase. Place boy peeking out from behind the couch (left), only wide eyes and top of head visible. Place cat on the windowsill (right), sitting calmly with tail curled. Place vase broken on the rug with water pooled and flowers scattered.
scenes.scene_description: In the bottom left corner, a large green leafy plant sits in a terracotta-colored pot, and next to it is a smaller green plant in a grey pot. A colorful geometric rug with patterns of blue, red, yellow, and white lies on the wooden floor, covered in pink and yellow flowers and petals. In the center foreground, a broken green vase with gold patterns lies shattered in a pool of water on the rug. Standing directly behind the broken vase is a girl with long dark hair, wearing a red t-shirt, blue jeans, and red and white sneakers; she has an angry expression with furrowed eyebrows and her arms crossed over her chest. To the right, a wooden side table holds a lamp with a beige shade and a small succulent in a white pot, with more petals scattered on the floor beneath it. Behind the girl is a large beige sofa featuring a yellow pillow on the left and a blue pillow on the right. A boy with curly blonde hair peeks out from behind the left side of the sofa, looking toward the broken vase with a concerned expression. On the top right backrest of the sofa sits an orange tabby cat looking toward the girl with a squinted, knowing expression. In the background on the left, a large arched window reveals a sunny outdoor scene with green trees, bushes, and white clouds against a blue sky. Below the window is a window seat with a blue and white striped cushion and a yellow pillow. The room has peach-colored walls, and a framed blue picture hangs on the wall to the far right.
